```plantuml
@startuml
class Category {
    +String name
    +setName(name: String) : void
    +getName() : String
}

class Movie {
    +code: Long
    +name: String
    +description: String
    +length: String
    +imageUrl: String
    +set()
    +get()
}

class User {
    +username: String
    +password: String
    +name: String
    +email: String
    +active: Boolean
    +admin: Boolean
    +set()
    +get()
}

Category "1" *-- "*" Movie

@enduml
```
